Subject: Re: Delivery Estimate and Transit Update  

Dear Team,  

Thank you for the update.  

Regarding the delivery estimate, it is scheduled for June 27th, which is a relatively long transit period. This may be due to extended holidays in the region from June 22nd to June 25th.  

We will continue to follow up and seek your support as needed.
